revision.comment: Bot: import from enwiki
revision.text:
{{clear}} == Ancient Egypt templates == '''Sidebars''' * [[Template:Ancient Egypt dynasties sidebar]] '''Other templates''' * [[Template:PharaohNamebox]] * {{hlist |[[Template:Infobox pharaoh]] ([[Template:Infobox pharaoh/Golden|/Golden]]|[[Template:Infobox pharaoh/Nebty|/Nebty]]|[[Template:Infobox pharaoh/Nomen|/Nomen]]|[[Template:Infobox pharaoh/Prenomen|/Prenomen]]|[[Template:Infobox pharaoh/Serekh|/Serekh]])}} * [[Template:History of Egypt]] <noinclude>
[[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancient_Egypt_template_list here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
